summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Next.js Shop the Look feature - backend APIs, homepage functionality, and admin panel all working successfully with minor UI issues

ui_bugs.issue: Modal overlay occasionally blocks save button click

design_issues.issue: Shows 6 product spots instead of expected 3 - possible duplication

passed_tests: POST /lookadmin/data saves data with correct auth (200)
Homepage loads correctly with Shop the Look section
All three tabs (Moms/Dads/Family) display and switch correctly
Moms tab shows hero image and product cards with Coming Soon badges
Dads tab shows placeholder text correctly
Family tab shows no products message correctly
QuickView modal opens/closes with all expected elements
Admin panel loads with all configuration sections
Load Products button shows expected Shopify error
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix minor product duplication in Moms tab (showing 6 instead of 3 products) and consider adding NEXT_PUBLIC_LOOK_ADMIN_PASS environment variable for better client-side validation
